company_context: Dremio: The Agentic Lakehouse for AI and Analytics Skip to content NEW Introducing Dremio's Next Generation Cloud The Agentic Lakehouse The only lakehouse built for agents, managed by agents Start for Free Try Interactive Demo TRUSTED BY: Why Dremio Fastest path to trusted AI Context for AI AI Semantic Layer gives AI the context required to find the right data and deliver accurate, trusted answers. Data Unification With Zero ETL Federate queries across all your sources with AI functions to process unstructured data. Agent Choice Use any agent (integrated analyst agent or choose your own) to find and query data to deliver insights and visualizations. Open Catalog (Apache Polaris) Fully managed and supported Polaris catalog with fine grained and role-based access control for end-to-end governance. 20x performance at the lowest cost Autonomous Reflections Automatically pre-computes aggregations, joins, and other materializations to accelerate common query patterns. Automatic Iceberg Clustering Automatically optimizes data layout on disk, without the downsides of traditional partitioning. Arrow-Based Engine Intelligent Query Engine is based on Apache Arrow, with LLVM-based code generation for maximum CPU efficiency. Columnar Cloud Cache (C3) Automatically caches hot data on local SSD's, speeding up data access by reducing object storage reads. Learn More Built on open lakehouse standards Apache Polaris Dremio is co-creator of Polaris, the leading Iceberg catalog. Apache Iceberg Dremio is a key contributor to Apache Iceberg, the leading open table format for lakehouses. Apache Arrow Dremio is co-creator of Arrow, the leading columnar, in-memory representation and interchange. Learn More What makes Dremio the Agentic Lakehouse? Agentic Designed for agentic-first experience Complete The full, integrated picture of all your data Contextual Provide AI the context it requires Governed Access control enforced end-to-end Autonomous Keeps performance on autopilot Read platform overview → CASE STUDIES Fueling AI innovation across industries 1000s of companies across all industries trust Dremio. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Emily and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours optimize their data pipelines and improve AI-driven decision making. I came across Dremio and was impressed with the work you're doing in the lakehouse space. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) Look, we're already invested in a number of solutions, including our own internal tools. I'm not sure we're in the market for another data processing platform. What makes DeepData AI so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your skepticism. However, our solution is designed to complement existing tools, not replace them. We've had success with companies like yours, who are looking to streamline their data workflows and reduce costs. For example, one of our clients was able to reduce their data processing time by 30% and save over $100,000 in infrastructure costs. I'd love to discuss how we can help Dremio achieve similar results.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (chuckles) That sounds too good to be true. I'm sure it's also very expensive. We're on a tight budget, and I'm not sure we can justify the cost of another solution.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget is always a concern. However, our pricing is competitive, and we offer a flexible pricing model that scales with your needs. We also offer a free trial, so you can see the value of our solution before committing to a purchase. Additionally, our solution can help you reduce costs in the long run by optimizing your data workflows and reducing the need for manual intervention.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (pauses) Okay, I'll listen. But we're also evaluating other solutions, including some of the big players in the market. What makes DeepData AI better than, say, Databricks or Snowflake?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. While those companies are certainly well-established, our solution is more agile and adaptable to changing data landscapes. We also offer a more personalized approach to customer support, which has been a key differentiator for us. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how our solution can address your specific pain points and provide a more tailored approach to your data processing needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (thoughtfully) Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'm willing to take a closer look and see if DeepData AI can really deliver on its promises. Can you send over a calendar invite for next week?

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Competitors
Feedback: The seller could have more effectively differentiated DeepData AI from competitors like Databricks and Snowflake by providing more specific examples or unique value propositions. Sentiment: Neutral
